ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "pid" TEXT /* Post ID from the source (e.g., Craigslist) */,
  "post_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the listing was posted */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the vehicle is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the vehicle is located */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., Toyota) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle (e.g., Camry) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle in USD */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "miles" INTEGER /* Total miles driven */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the listing for external reference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the listing */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Various attributes related to the vehicle */,
  "img_link" TEXT /* Link to the image of the vehicle */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle location */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, sold) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the listing */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the listing was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_make FOREIGN KEY ("make") REFERENCES makes ("make_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES models ("model_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., buyer, seller, admin) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Reference to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle listing involved in the transaction */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer in the transaction */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Type of payment method used in the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing being inquired about */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer making the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the inquiry was made */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message or question from the buyer */,
  "inquiry_status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry (e.g., new, responded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle listing */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event (e.g., ownership change, accident) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., ownership change, accident) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the specifications */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the listing of the vehicle */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V6, Electric) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., Gas, Diesel) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "features" TEXT /* Special features of the vehicle (e.g., GPS, Leather seats) */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV, truck) */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_specs_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city entry */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state entry */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the state is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make entry */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the make */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model entry */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "year_introduced" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
